repo_url.name: Repository URL
repo_url.description: Full HTTPS clone URL of your config repository, e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo.git or https://gitea.example.com/owner/repo.git. Works with GitHub, Gitea, GitLab, or any self-hosted Git server.

git_token.name: Git Token
git_token.description: Personal/API access token for the Git host above, with permission to push to the repository

git_auth_user.name: Git Auth User
git_auth_user.description: Optional. Some hosts (Gitea, GitLab, self-hosted servers) require a username paired with the token. Leave blank for GitHub, where the token alone is sufficient.

git_user_name.name: Git User Name
git_user_name.description: Name to use for Git commits

git_user_email.name: Git User Email
git_user_email.description: Email to use for Git commits

watched_files.name: Watched Files
watched_files.description: List of files to monitor for changes

commit_message_template.name: Commit Message Template
commit_message_template.description: Template for commit messages. Use {files} for changed files, {ha_version} for HA version, {git_hash} for previous commit hash, {timestamp} for current time

sync_interval.name: Sync Interval
sync_interval.description: How often to commit changes (in seconds)

branch.name: Git Branch
branch.description: Git branch to push changes to
